underlying_goal: Execute phase 44 of a namespace renaming project (gsd → gsdr), create a PR, pass CI, merge, and clean up
friction_detail: CI failed because the CI workflow itself still referenced old gsd namespace paths, requiring a fix and re-push.
brief_summary: User wanted to execute phase 44 of a namespace renaming project, verify correctness, merge the PR, and clean up — all completed successfully with one CI fix needed.
